name: ai-finance
description: 债券收益计算工具 — 输入 6 位基金代码，一键获取关键收益指标

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup: cd server && if not exist .env copy .env.example .env && echo 请编辑 server/.env 填入 MONGODB_URL
